issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Find the aha moment for a SaaS product
scenarios.rationale: Treatment ran the documented aha-moment method (list week-1 actions, split did vs didn't, compare D30 retention by group) and tied the winning action to onboarding redesign; baseline suggested generic engagement scoring and feature usage tracking without the retention-gap comparison.

scenarios.name: Diagnose a leaky AARRR funnel
scenarios.rationale: Treatment measured drop-off at each AARRR stage, identified the largest absolute drop as the bottleneck, cohorted by acquisition channel and plan tier, and refused to optimize acquisition before retention; baseline recommended broad conversion optimization without cohorting or bottleneck identification.
